items.title: Electrified Weekly – Bluetti FridgePower station exclusive launch deals from $807, Segway Xyber e-bike + extra battery bundle, more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Electrified Weekly – the best place to find all of this week’s best deals and new releases to electrify your life and protect Mother Nature. It’s been a big week for Green Deals, with ongoing Early Prime Day deals across the various sections, as well as some new launches, like Bluetti’s ultra-slim FridgePower Portable Power Station and bundles getting our exclusive bonus savings code that start prices at $807, not to mention the various full Early Prime Day Sale lineups below. We’ve also got plenty of EV deals to jump on, too, like the Segway Xyber Electric Bike getting a first-ever bundle with an extra battery ($1,000 value) for up to 112 miles of riding at its $2,900 low. There’s also the exclusive new low price on the Yozma IN 10 Electric Dirt Bike at $879, as well as the new low prices on Aventon’s Aventure 3 All-Terrain e-bikes at $1,749. All these and so much more are waiting for you below, so head on down and revel in some of the best deals of the year while they last.

items.title: 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – Nike summer sale, adidas additional $30 off $100, henley shirt, $7.50 more
items.summary: Welcome to 9to5Toys Fashion Weekly – your virtual wardrobe of discounted apparel finds. From top-tier fashion houses and everyday pieces for your work week, right through to super affordable pickups to freshen up your essentials, every week we scour the interwebs for the best deals on footwear and clothing to ensure you never pay full price to update your closet game. Headliners to check out include the current additional $30 off $100 sale at adidas, this Nike summer sale promo code, as well as this linen henley shirt at just $7.50. Head below to see all of the rest.

items.title: adidas upgrades summer sale with extra $30 off $100 on already discounted gear: Soccer jerseys, shoes, more

Highlights this time around include ADIZERO ADIOS PRO 4, the Real Madrid 25/26 Home Authentic Jersey, some of the Core adidas Performance Polo Shirts, and more but there is a sizable selection of gear to browse through here that is eligible for the bonus code. Check it all out on this landing page and some picks that stood out for us below.
